Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONERS RICHARD MCCOLLAM AND KATHLEEN TARR'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D302)

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER RICHARD MCCOLLAM, KATHLEEN TARR's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is Off calendar without prejudice to being renoticed. The notice of hearing and petition papers were only recently served on some or all of the respondents which did not provide them with sufficient notice for this hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
